profile.name: Your Name
profile.bio: A curious person who loves music, slow mornings, and building things.
profile.about_p1: I'm a curious and creative person living somewhere between music, technology, and long afternoon walks. I find beauty in the details — a melody that feels like it was made just for you, or a book that changes how you see things.
profile.about_p2: By day I build things with code. By night I listen to music, read, take photos of whatever catches my eye, and write when something feels worth putting into words.

posts.title: On listening to music alone at night
posts.excerpt: There's something about 2am and headphones that makes every song feel like it was written just for you.

posts.title: Why I stopped trying to optimize everything
posts.excerpt: I used to think more efficiency meant more life. I'm not sure that's true anymore.

interests.title: Music
interests.desc: From Bon Iver to Beethoven. I listen to music the way others breathe — constantly and without thinking about it too much.

interests.title: Reading
interests.desc: Books that change how you look at things. Fiction, philosophy, the occasional biography.

interests.title: Building things
interests.desc: Code is my medium. I love building tools that solve real problems — apps, utilities, experiments.

interests.title: Photography
interests.desc: Mostly with my phone. I'm drawn to light, texture, and small moments that pass too quickly.

interests.title: Gaming
interests.desc: A Minecraft veteran. I appreciate games that reward curiosity and let you build on your own terms.

interests.title: Slow living
interests.desc: Long walks, quiet mornings, tea that's always too hot. The best moments arrive when you stop forcing them.
